changes.description: Phase 4: reconciliation_state.json fallback when grounding_state_v3 absent. Phase 5: _synthesize_ceu_registry_from_reconciliation() + _synthesize_dom_layer_from_ceus() for reconciliation-based specimens. Phases 6+7, 8a, 8b, 9: graceful skip for S1 structural-only specimens without LENS infrastructure.
Reconciliation advanced from INITIALIZED to COMPLETE. 15 candidates: 11 CONFIRMED, 4 REJECTED.
All 13 obligations resolved (RESOLVED_BY_REJECTION or RESOLVED_BY_CONFIRMATION).
15 reconciliation events appended (RCE-ST2-0001 through RCE-ST2-0015).
Normalized from flat list to wrapped dict format; SPE updated with 32 propositions.
SPE derivation: 32 propositions, mean confidence 0.80.
Proposition derivation lineage from SPE.
Proposition review queue for SQO operator workflow.
DOM layer synthesized from CEU domains (11 groups, 3273 nodes).
Binding envelope: 33 nodes, 24 edges, 11 capability surfaces.
Empty learning activation manifest (no consumable learnings for this run).
130 chronicle events from full pipeline execution with GEN-1 emitter active.
Chronicle runtime manifest — COMPLETE status, 17 checkpoints.
17 checkpoint files frozen at pipeline phase boundaries (checkpoint_00 through checkpoint_16).
1 hero moment candidate: HM-stackstorm-001 (67.5% cross-domain coupling).
92KB genesis chronicle — 9 chapters, Z1-Z5 zoom, 130 events, 17 checkpoints, 32 propositions, 1 hero moment.
Compilation manifest with content hash and source counts.
